log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Mountain Dwarf — Iron Concentration's turn ---

→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Mountain Dwarf — Iron Concentration: SUCCESS. 19 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
